parameters.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
                  xmlns:tns="http://www.navis.com/services/argoservice"
                  xmlns:types="http://types.webservice.argo.navis.com/v1.0">
  <soapenv:Header/>
  <soapenv:Body>
    <tns:genericInvoke>

      <scopeCoordinateIdsWsType>
        <types:operatorId>DPW</types:operatorId>
        <types:complexId>CLL</types:complexId>
        <types:facilityId>CLL</types:facilityId>
        <types:yardId>CLL</types:yardId>
      </scopeCoordinateIdsWsType>

      <xmlDoc><![CDATA[
<groovy class-name='DpwCllGvyInjeNSGCTruckDriver' class-location='database' >
    <parameters> 
        <parameter id='driverTranType' value='update' />
        <parameter id='driverTrkcGkey' value='0' /> <parameter id='driverCardId' value='25544130' />
        <parameter id='driverRequestXml' value='<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?>
<snx xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.navis.com/argo">
<truck-driver card-id="25544130" license-nbr="Q25544130" name="WALTER LORENZO SINCHI GONZALES" email-address="sinchiyarrinmilagrosceleste@gmail.com" is-hazard-licensed="N" status="OK" flex-1="SINCHI GONZALES" flex-3="WALTER LORENZO" flex-4="0">
<custom-dynamic-flex-fields xmlns="">
<custom-dynamic-flex-field name="customFlexFields.driverCustomDFFphone" value="51955314049" />
<custom-dynamic-flex-field name="customFlexFields.driverCustomDFFfingerprint" value="true" />
<custom-dynamic-flex-field name="customFlexFields.driverCustomDFFRole" value="DEPOT" />
<custom-dynamic-flex-field name="customFlexFields.driverCustomDFFTypeDriver" value="Truck" />
<custom-dynamic-flex-field name="customFlexFields.driverCustomDFFfingerprintcll" value="false" />
</custom-dynamic-flex-fields>
</truck-driver>
</snx>' /> 
        <parameter id='driverStatusRelation' value='false' />  
    </parameters> 
</groovy>
      ]]></xmlDoc>

    </tns:genericInvoke>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
